name: Mushi Mansion
short_description: A survival horror game with a focus on combat about escaping a property swarming with huge, deadly bugs.
detailed_description:
A survival horror beat-em-up about escaping a property swarming with huge, deadly bugs (mushi).
  • Limited healing items and saves.
  • Evade danger by rolling, jumping, and performing backflips.
  • Stomp or elbow drop downed mushi to do double damage.
  • Enemies that move from room to room.
  • Unlockable options, difficulties, and alternate player colours.
  • A variety of enemy types/variants.
  • All door keys explain what they unlock.
  • Only 1 puzzle and it's optional.
  • Different control options: Arrow Keys, WASD, Xbox Controller, PlayStation Controller
